prompt: Write a 400-500 word email to the engineering team explaining why the product launch is being delayed by two weeks and what the revised timeline looks like.
Write a 400-500 word blog post explaining how API rate limiting works and why it matters for application reliability.
Write a 150-200 word Slack message updating the team on a project that hit a major blocker this week, what you tried, and what the plan is now.
Write a 400-500 word executive summary of a quarterly review for a B2B SaaS company that grew revenue 15% but saw churn increase.
Write a 400-500 word proposal for building an internal tool that automates weekly reporting from three data sources into a single dashboard.
Write a 400-500 word explanation of blockchain for someone who has never heard of it, aimed at a general business audience.
Write a 400-500 word argument for why remote work is better than hybrid for knowledge workers. Take a clear position.
Write a 400-500 word post-mortem for a production outage caused by a database migration that took the site down for 45 minutes.
Write a 300-400 word introduction to a company newsletter covering three topics: a new product feature, a team offsite, and an upcoming industry conference.
Write a 400-500 word how-to guide for setting up a new development environment, including prerequisites, installation steps, and verification.
